headline: Chief AI Officer at WSO2 focused on enterprise AI, agentic systems, cloud platforms, and responsible product delivery.
title: Chief AI Officer
confidenceNote: WSO2 team and conference pages consistently identify Rania Khalaf as Chief AI Officer, with prior AI, cloud, IBM Research, and Inari leadership background.
bioMarkdown: Chief AI Officer at WSO2 leading enterprise AI and agentic platform strategy. Useful match for conversations on AI-native products, cloud platforms, responsible AI adoption, and moving research into enterprise software.

secondary.note: Public scholar profile identifies Rania Khalaf with WSO2 and research interests in AI, distributed computing, and business automation.

secondary.label: Enterprise Times interview
secondary.note: Interview coverage corroborates her WSO2 Chief AI Officer role and AI strategy focus.

headline: Head of Agentic AI at Hinge Health building compliant AI systems for digital healthcare.

headline: FINRA architecture and engineering leader working on large-scale market data analytics and interactive data applications.
title: Principal Architect
confidenceNote: AWS re:Invent materials and independent event recaps identify Ravi Ramanujam as a FINRA principal engineering speaker on Athena for Apache Spark; participant-provided title says Principal Architect, while public event material uses Principal Engineer.
bioMarkdown: Principal Architect at FINRA, with public speaking work around interactive analytics applications and Apache Spark on AWS. Useful match for conversations on large-scale market data, regulated analytics platforms, cloud data tooling, and enabling business users with self-service analysis.

primary.note: AWS session deck names Ravi Ramanujam from FINRA and describes FINRA's large-scale Athena for Apache Spark analytics use case.

primary.note: Public post promotes Ravi Ramanujam's FINRA presentation on Amazon Athena for Apache Spark at re:Invent.

secondary.label: Classmethod re:Invent recap
secondary.note: Independent recap lists Ravi Ramanujam as FINRA speaker for the interactive analytics applications session.

headline: Co-founder and CEO of .txt building structured generation and reliability infrastructure for production AI agents.

confidenceNote: .txt company page, GitHub profile, GOSIM speaker page, and The Org consistently identify Rémi Louf as CEO or co-founder CEO of .txt.
bioMarkdown: Co-founder and CEO of .txt, building reliability and structured-output infrastructure for AI systems. Strong match for discussions on production agents, constrained generation, composable AI software, open-source AI infrastructure, and developer-facing AI tools.
